allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([x for x in v if x.startswith\(''''18.3''''\)][-3:]\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''./node_modules/expo/package.json''\); console.log\(''peerDeps:'', JSON.stringify\(p.peerDependencies\)\); console.log\(''deps RN:'', p.dependencies && p.dependencies[''react-native'']\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''RN:'''', d.get\(''''react-native''''\)\); print\(''''screens:'''', d.get\(''''react-native-screens''''\)\); print\(''''safe-area:'''', d.get\(''''react-native-safe-area-context''''\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''main:'''', p.get\(''''main''''\)\); print\(''''browser:'''', p.get\(''''browser''''\)\); print\(''''exports:'''', list\(p.get\(''''exports'''', {}\).keys\(\)\)[:5]\)")
